prose: The frontier molecular orbitals of TEMPO were calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The molecule was treated as a neutral doublet (charge 0, multiplicity 2). The calculation was performed using the PySCF backend. The resulting HOMO energy is -6.3375 eV and the LUMO energy is -2.4651 eV, giving a HOMO-LUMO gap of 3.8724 eV. The SCF calculation converged in 12 cycles.
